suggestions.observation: Pearson r = -0.2102 with SPY 63d fwd return (p=0.0, if available).
suggestions.rationale: NFCI aggregates ~100 financial-conditions indicators. Its 13-week momentum captures rate at which conditions tighten. Negative sign is economically coherent: rapidly tightening conditions predict lower forward SPY returns.
suggestions.possible_use_case: Cross-pair credit-stress composite or new pair nfci_momentum -> SPY
suggestions.caveats: NFCI incorporates overlapping credit-spread components; double-counting risk when composited directly with HY-IG.
suggestions.notes: Off-scope per ECON-SD (not an hy_ig_spread_pct derivative). Flagged for future pair catalog.

suggestions.observation: Pearson r = -0.2576 with SPY 126d fwd return (p=0.0, if available).
suggestions.rationale: Banks-to-small-caps relative strength gauges lender balance-sheet health. A rising ratio signals late-cycle stress complementary to HY-IG.
suggestions.caveats: Partially endogenous to SPY (both ETFs contain equity). Needs orthogonalization before use as clean predictor.
suggestions.notes: Off-scope per ECON-SD. Candidate for dedicated equity-stress pair.

suggestions.observation: Pearson r = -0.1069 with SPY 63d fwd return (p=0.0, if available).
suggestions.rationale: Classic recession predictor. Inversion historically precedes every US recession and typically leads equity drawdowns by 6-18 months.
suggestions.possible_use_case: Recession-backdrop regime overlay or standalone pair
suggestions.caveats: Long lead-lag (6-18 months) means near-term r is weak. 2022 inversion did not produce expected drawdown — relationship may be evolving.
suggestions.notes: Off-scope per ECON-SD. Prime candidate for yield_spread_10y3m -> SPY pair.

suggestions.observation: Pearson r = 0.0894 with SPY 63d fwd return (p=0.0, if available).
suggestions.rationale: Within-IG quality-tier stress gauge — how much extra yield the market demands for the lowest IG rung. Complements HY-IG with IG-side stress signal.
suggestions.caveats: Sign may differ from HY-IG; BBB share of IG index has grown structurally since 2010 introducing composition drift.
suggestions.notes: Off-scope per ECON-SD (axis is HY-IG not BBB-IG). Future variant family: HY-IG + BBB-IG + CCC-BB spectrum.

suggestions.observation: Pearson r = -0.0029 with SPY 21d fwd return (p=0.8331, if available).
suggestions.rationale: Backwardation (negative term structure) indicates acute short-horizon fear premium exceeding long-horizon — historically a near-term stress signal. Complements credit spread with options-market sentiment.
suggestions.possible_use_case: Complementary regime filter alongside HY-IG or standalone VIX-regime pair
suggestions.caveats: Noisy at short horizons. COVID March 2020 spike dominates the tail. May double-count stress signal with HMM state probability.
suggestions.notes: Off-scope per ECON-SD. Covered in VIX/VIX3M -> SPY pair (Pair #11 already completed).
